occupation: Account Manager at RENT A SIGN
headline: Sales | Business Development | Nurturing Business Relationships

experiences.title: Sales Marketing Executive
experiences.description: Think Align Limited develops signage and way-finding solutions for Corporate firm, hotels, Shopping centres, Supermarkets, and individuals – often in cooperation with the architect or facility manager. Our company covers all aspects of the supply, installation and application of signs, including but not limited to: ·       Illuminated Signs ·       Vinyl cut graphics ·       Large Scale Digital Printing ·       3D Signs ·       Building Signage ·       Promotional items ·       Vehicles wrapping Think Align also supplies graphic design and project management services. We focus on making all our signage projects as sustainable as possible. For example, by producing signs with integrated technology to save energy or by using certified products that can be reused. We pride ourselves on challenges and innovation which is at forefront of our company. Our culture is one of continuous improvement and this reflect in our workplace and manufacturing process. Think Align has a wealth of knowledge and expertise on signage production and digital print management collectively over 15 years.
experiences.location: Beau Bassin, Plaines Wilhems District, Mauritius

experiences.title: Sales Coordinator
experiences.description: - Follow up promptly on any sales lead and requests to convert into sales. - Understand clients' need and suggest adequate signage - Liaise with Project Manager & Estimator for costing process. - Prepare quotes for clients and follow-up on quotes sent - Keep precise and orderly records of quotes, clients and projects through dashboards (Zoho). - Conduct site visits upon client request and needs. - Follow up with designer and production team upon clients' approval - Perform administration duties – filing, quotation, invoicing, chasing of debtors, e-mailing. - Ensure after-sales customer service in order to deal with all grievances. + any other duties/tasks assigned by management (Follow up of project on site with installation team). - Assist with major tender proposals related to product launch. - Build and foster, long-lasting customer relationships by partnering with them and understanding their needs.

experiences.title: Marketing Assistant
experiences.description: - Updating of information and pictures on the company’s website - Community Management of Facebook and LinkedIn - Creation of email campaigns - Press booking for clients - Delivery of finished products to clients at reception - Administrative duties for marketing department - Debt collection - Provide administrative assistance for sales team - Creation of mailing list for email campaigns

experiences.title: Assistant Manager
experiences.description: - Community Management for Facebook Pages and Instagram Accounts for several companies - Boosting and promoting posts through ad set campaign for companies - Processing of invoices and payments received - Processing of Facebook report for companies - Filing of documents, invoices, receipts etc - Liaise with accounting department for VAT Return - Processing booking in newspapers for clients - Liaise with media companies for booking - Meet clients to understand their needs and suggest marketing plans for their business - Work with designer for ideas for artwork creation - Overview Social Media Calendars and amend taglines - Liaise with HR / Payroll Officer for the salary - Issue payments to suppliers - Conduct interviews with the Managing Director - Chase client for payments - Prepare estimates / quotes for clients - Liaise with different suppliers (printing companies / press agencies) - Liaise with service providers for events - Event management
experiences.location: Suite 216, St James Court, St Denis Street, Port Louis

experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Coordinator
experiences.description: - Creation of database of potential clients and arrange meetings for presentation - Promoting online business directory (maugle.com) to potential clients during meetings or by sending email - Selling mass mailing services to clients - Uploading of company details on maugle.com
experiences.location: Suite 216, St James Court, Port Louis

experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Assistant
experiences.description: Hired as a trainee to do the Social Media Management and progressed as a Sales and Marketing Assistant. Was involved in the website maintenance, working on the back office of real estate portals, follow-up of requests, drawing invoices for the agency fees and site visits. Was also in charge of the recording and filing of the company's expenses in order to submit the VAT Return of the company for every quarterly period.

experiences.title: Administrative Assistant
experiences.description: PA to the director. Follow up of orders from individuals and corporate institutions. Sending quotation and pricing . Entry of new books received every week on informatic system for good stock maintenance. Filing, order of stationeries for the whole library, open general correspondences and helping at the cashier during lunchtime.

experiences.title: Sales Officer
experiences.description: Assist corporate companies to enroll their employees for the different workshops and conferences organised by the company. Thus, having the opportunity to assist to different workshops and conferences
